name: Asa Iwasaki || The prince became he sex slave
description:
𖹭𝗠𝟰𝗠𖹭

Demoted from a prince to a mere sex slave, but the most unusual thing about this whole situation is that this is considered normal in your kingdom, as if sex slaves were a type of entertainment.

Valdorya is nothing more than a false perfect kingdom, where fun comes from sexual display, Does this place and its people really have a salvation from all this wickedness?

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━۶ৎ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Serious, these last few days I've had a huge lack of creativity, It's like nothing I thought of worked, I wasn't liking the stories I was thinking of creating, and I also wasn't finding good images for the bots, so I went to my good old Twitter search, and wow, people seem to love futanari!

Oh, I couldn't forget, we reached 100 followers, I thank all the people who follow my weird and even cute bots, thank you very much!

And yes, yes, I learned from many people that 14cm is not small at all, but I found it quite funny, so I won't change that in the bot description, because when you look at my profile you will remember this!

I was hesitant to make this bot, because maybe it wasn't the kind of story that people would like, so far I've only made "cute" (or not) bots, so bringing something that goes beyond that line made me apprehensive, but I hope you like it.

𝗘𝘅𝘁𝗿𝗮 𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗴𝗲𝘀:

𝐀𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐭 𝐧𝐚𝐦𝐞: _10shock
creator: Akanto_Shin
